name: openfate-bazi-mcp
description: Deterministic Bazi charts with True Solar Time, Da Yun, and branch interactions.
long_description: OpenFate Bazi MCP gives AI agents a deterministic Four Pillars calculation layer instead of asking a language model to guess calendrical math. It supports solar and lunar dates, True Solar Time, Zi-hour boundary policies, enriched pillars, Da Yun cycles, branch interactions, and reverse Bazi lookup. All calculations run locally and no birth data is sent to OpenFate.

tools.name: calculate_bazi_chart
tools.description: Calculate a deterministic Bazi chart with True Solar Time, enriched pillars, and Da Yun cycles.

tools.name: detect_bazi_interactions
tools.description: Detect deterministic Earthly Branch interactions for natal, annual, or target branches.

tools.name: calculate_true_solar_time
tools.description: Calculate True Solar Time from civil time, longitude, timezone, and optional DST offset.

tools.name: reverse_bazi_to_solar_times
tools.description: Find possible Gregorian datetimes for a supplied four-pillar Bazi string.

tools.name: get_openfate_bazi_policy
tools.description: Return OpenFate calculation policy and guidance for deterministic Bazi tool calls.

tools.name: get_openfate_bazi_resources
tools.description: Return canonical OpenFate resources for charts, readings, compatibility, and True Solar Time.
